room.name: a collapsing disused tunnel
room.description: The tiled walls bow inward where the ceiling has partially fallen. Rubble and dust clog the floor, but a narrow crawlspace continues east. Party notices, half-buried, warn against "UNAUTHORIZED ENTRY".

room.name: Aldwych Station
room.description: A disused spur lined with cracked tiles and rotting posters. The tunnel here was sealed decades ago, but a narrow passage continues east.

room.name: below the Ministry of Truth
room.description: A manhole with an iron ladder leads up towards the ministry itself. A broken telescreen would have guarded the passage up but now it dangles by its cables, sparking faintly.

room.name: a Security Gate
room.description: A hatch of sturdy steel bars is bolted shut preventing access into the ministry. You can see the bolt but it can't reached through the narrow gap between the bars. Behind the hatch a faded Ministry crest is painted directly onto the wall tiles.
